title: Escaped characters count double in INSERT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test2 (id INTEGER, description LONG VARCHAR DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test2 (id, description) VALUES (1, '\\''), (2, NULL);
SELECT LENGTH(description) FROM test2 WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Escaped characters count double in INSERT statement
